refund_requests.reason: Changed mind - do not need it anymore
refund_requests.rejection_reason: Return window of 7 days from delivery has expired

refund_requests.reason: Order not yet delivered, requesting cancellation instead

policies.return_window_note: Returns must be initiated within 7 days of delivery for most categories. Electronics: 7 days. Apparel & textiles: 10 days. Perishables/personal care: not returnable.
policies.refund_processing_time: 5-7 business days after return pickup/approval, depending on payment method.
policies.refund_method_rules: Refunds are issued to the original payment method. COD orders are refunded via bank transfer/UPI after customer provides bank details.
policies.cancellation_policy: Orders can be cancelled free of charge before they are shipped. Once shipped, the order must be returned after delivery instead of cancelled. Orders marked 'Out for Delivery' cannot be cancelled; please refuse the delivery or initiate a return afterward.
policies.exchange_policy: Exchanges are allowed within the same return window for size/color variants subject to availability, processed as a return + new order.
policies.damaged_or_wrong_item_policy: If you received a damaged, defective, or wrong item, return shipping is free and full refund or replacement is provided with no questions asked.
policies.partial_refund_policy: If only some items in a multi-item order are returned, refund is calculated proportionally based on item price, excluding non-refundable shipping charges if applicable.
policies.refund_delay_policy: If a refund is not received within the expected timeframe, customers should allow 2 additional business days for bank processing before escalation.
